testcase.name: runScenario

error.message:

obscures it Build info: version: '4.17.0', revision: 'e52b1be057*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.8.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Command: [bf88ae0d-14eb-4a75-b719-169245eaf936, clickElement {id=9bc72301-18df-4c67-878e-aa8b2c9bf8ac}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, browserVersion: 147.0.3, moz:accessibilityChecks: false, moz:buildID: 20260203002554, moz:geckodriverVersion: 0.36.0, moz:headless: false, moz:platformVersion: 10.0, moz:processID: 22600, moz:profile: C:\Users\hd888\AppData\Loca..., moz:shutdownTimeout: 60000, moz:webdriverClick: true, moz:windowless: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10....} Element: [[FirefoxDriver: firefox on windows (bf88ae0d-14eb-4a75-b719-169245eaf936)] -> xpath: //img[@alt='naukri user profile img']/self::img[@class='nI-gNb-icon-img']] Session ID: bf88ae0d-14eb-4a75-b719-169245eaf936
